questions.question: What is the main purpose of HTML in web development?
options: To define the structure and content of the page

questions.question: Which HTML element is most appropriate for a group of navigation links?
What is the main purpose of CSS?
options: To style and lay out web pages

questions.question: Which CSS property is part of the box model?
What does JavaScript mainly add to a webpage?
What is the DOM?
options: A browser model of the HTML document

questions.question: Which JavaScript method is commonly used to load data from a local JSON file or API?
Why is semantic HTML considered good practice?
options: It makes all pages look the same
It improves meaning, readability, and accessibility
It replaces the need for CSS

questions.question: Which browser feature lets a site save quiz attempts locally between page loads?
What should happen before a quiz is submitted if some questions are unanswered?
options: The score should still be calculated
The browser should close the page
Submission should be blocked and unanswered questions highlighted
The reward API should be called
